docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY CRUMMETT, SARA AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, INNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY CRUMMETT, SARA MILLER, INNA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED MAR-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, INNA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUMMETT, SARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MILLER, INNA THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS JUSTIFIED IN TERMINATING THE LEASE BEFORE ITS TERM. PLAINITFF HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO THE SECURITY DEPOSIT DEDUCTIONS, AND THAT THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $500.00 SHOULD BE APPLIED TO THE FEBRUARY RENT AS PAYMENT IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
